title: helianthemum cinereum f. floribundum
intro: Helianthemum cinereum f. floribundum, also known as Rockrose or Dusky Rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It is a low-growing, spreading shrub with delicate, white or pale pink flowers and silver-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe, for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum cinereum f. floribundum are often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are valued for their potential health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
